nodes.label: Grafana Ingress
nodes.rationale: nginx-public Ingress named grafana in namespace monitoring. Hosts gemberkoekje.nl (path /grafana) and grafana.gemberkoekje.nl (path /). TLS secret grafana-tls via ClusterIssuer letsencrypt-prod. Routes to Service grafana:80 created by the monitoring HelmRelease (infrastructure/monitoring/grafana-release.yaml), not an apps/ Service.
